calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Granted.

Plaintiff must provide a version of the proposed consent judgment with signatures from all parties.

Plaintiff must inform the court of any communication from the Attorney General on this case received after the date of the Smith Declaration (20 January 2023).

Order and Consent Judgment were signed after hearing.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
